response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure, directly matching the required stack and responsibilities; he has demonstrable experience with AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks like Vitest (via similar tools), Docker/Kubernetes, and cross-platform development, with a strong track record of ownership and process improvement.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven AI-agent and developer tooling experience at re:cinq
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is only basic in a Berlin-based role
Some roles involve legacy or non-standard stacks (e.g., DLang) which may raise questions about modernization focus
